channel.title: budding on Sabiqul's Braindump
channel.description: Recent content in budding on Sabiqul's Braindump

item.title: Metamorphosis
item.description: author Kafka, F. tags Mortality but moreso illness Personal Notes Read this book in one sitting ont he plane. Felt sad for the protagonist at the end of it but was left a bit confused as to why it was so highly regarded. Notes on Metamorphosis Gregor (protagonist) considers himself a burden on his family much like patients with serious illnesses might I’d highlighted the book more, but only this quote seemed to be of any major significance to me.
